subject: [RFC PATCH v4 20/27] mm/gup: NP_OPS_LONGTERM_PIN - private node longterm pin support

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: The patch introduces a new flag, NP_OPS_LONGTERM_PIN, which allows private node folios to be long-term pinned. The flag is used in conjunction with the existing folio_is_longterm_pinnable() function.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new flag, NP_OPS_LONGTERM_PIN, for private node folios to opt-in for long-term pinning support. The flag is used in conjunction with the existing folio_is_longterm_pinnable() function, which checks if a private node allows long-term pinning based on the presence of the NP_OPS_LONGTERM_PIN flag.
